original_image_tags: A handwritten note in the top right corner reads "PERS FILES" with a red line drawn through it.
A red stamped date at the bottom reads "58 APR 26 1956".

elements.description: A rectangular stamp with a red border containing the text 'BY COURIER SVC.', 'O 4 APR 1 7', and 'COMM. FBI'.
A small stamp at the top right with the text 'PERK' and 'FILES' over a graphic.
A large red date stamp at the bottom left with the text '58 APR 26 1956'.
A faint blue stamp at the top left with the text 'RECORDED-32'.

judge.reason: Description A mentions a handwritten note reading 'PERS FILES' and a red stamped date, while Description B mentions completely different stamps ('BY COURIER SVC.', 'PERK FILES', 'RECORDED-32'), with the only overlap being the date stamp which is described as being at different locations (bottom vs. bottom left) and both describe different overall visual elements.
